ApprovalRule.description: One row of the D7 approval matrix: a change class and who must approve it.
ApprovalRule.title: ApprovalRule

Approver.description: Who must sign off a change class (D7). ``dual`` = both founder and Bruntsfield.
Approver.title: Approver

ChangeClass.description: The blast-radius classes the D7 approval matrix routes on.
ChangeClass.title: ChangeClass

Department.description: A venture department (engineering, GTM, ops, …) with its own repo/queue and gate.

id.description: Department id, unique within the venture.
id.title: Id

queue_path.description: Path (in the repo) to the department's work queue.
queue_path.title: Queue Path

Department.title: Department

DepartmentGate.description: How a department's actions are gated. GTM/external gates firm up post-FB-012.
DepartmentGate.title: DepartmentGate

FounderIdentity.description:
The human founder's identity across GitHub and Google Workspace.

``workspace_email`` is a Bruntsfield-assigned account on the venture's Workspace domain,
managed by the founder — it is the studio login (Google OAuth) and the venture-scoping key
(D6), never a personal consumer mailbox (D3). The validator refuses consumer domains so a
misconfigured manifest fails loud instead of leaking the founder's personal identity into the
send/auth path.

github_login.description: The founder's own GitHub account (D2: added as a collaborator).
github_login.title: Github Login

workspace_email.description: Bruntsfield-assigned venture-domain Google Workspace account (e.g. ross@thereset.com). Never a personal @gmail.com.
workspace_email.title: Workspace Email

FounderIdentity.title: FounderIdentity

Lane.description: A workshop lane bound to one venture repo (a Claude Code + tmux lane on the venture VPS).

id.description: Lane id, unique within the venture.
id.title: Id

repo.description: Repo this lane builds (slug or full name).
repo.title: Repo

standing_order.description: The lane's durable standing order (its brief between sessions).
standing_order.title: Standing Order

tmux.description: tmux session/window binding on the VPS.
tmux.title: Tmux

Lane.title: Lane

LaneStatus.description: Health of a workshop lane (a Claude Code lane on the venture's VPS).
LaneStatus.title: LaneStatus

VentureStatus.description: Lifecycle of a venture in the studio.
VentureStatus.title: VentureStatus

VpsBinding.description:
The venture's own VPS (Decision D1: one box per venture). Fields are populated by FB-011
provisioning, so an un-provisioned venture carries ``vps=None`` and a provisioned one may
still have ``provisioned_at=None`` until the runbook records it.

host.description: Hostname or IP of the venture's VPS.
host.title: Host

provisioned_at.description: When the box was provisioned; None until FB-011 records it.
provisioned_at.title: Provisioned At

VpsBinding.title: VpsBinding

description:
A co-created Foundry venture — the root config object the studio scopes everything to.

Everything venture-specific lives here (venture-as-config); the studio core stays generic.
``vps`` and identities may be unset before FB-011 provisioning. The ``approval_matrix`` is the
D7 governance record: which change class routes to which approver(s).

approval_matrix.description: D7: rules mapping each change class to its required approver(s).
approval_matrix.title: Approval Matrix

connectors.description: Connector names available to the venture.
connectors.title: Connectors

repos.description: Repo slugs owned by this venture.
repos.title: Repos

tier3_ref.description: Reference into the Tier 3 venture pack, if any.
tier3_ref.title: Tier3 Ref

vps.description: The venture's VPS binding; None until FB-011 provisions it.

title: Venture
